headline: Cramer Says Don't Chase ASML After $75 Jump—Wait For A Dip To Buy This 'Great' Semi Play
summary: Jim Cramer recommended buying Steel Dynamics (STLD) & Bloom Energy (BE). ASML & Amphenol (APH) reported strong earnings. Digi Power X (DGXX) upsized offering.
